name: folio-build-gate
description: Build-gate shim used by the Flow orchestration tool — proxies pnpm build/test/knip to the root project scripts.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck --prefix ../.. && npm run typecheck --prefix ../../relay && npm run typecheck --prefix ../../puller
scripts.knip: echo 'no knip (scaffold story — no dead-code check)' && exit 0
